hero.title: Search VRChat Items Efficiently by Tags
hero.description: PolySeek is a service for searching VRChat 3D avatars and accessories by tags. As the community adds tags to items, search capability improves.

advancedSearch.title: Advanced Search
advancedSearch.description:
Find what you need quickly with
negative search and various filters.

tagSystem.title: Tag System
tagSystem.description:
Community-driven tagging makes it
easy to find niche items.

productRegistration.title: Item Registration
productRegistration.description: Simply enter a BOOTH.pm URL to easily register item information.

userAuth.title: Login Features
userAuth.description:
Register wanted and owned items
to your PolySeek account to
search within your lists using
PolySeek's unique tags.
*Not a BOOTH integration feature
